member.name: T:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.AiTutor.OllamaClient
member.summary: Calls the configured local Ollama HTTP API without external-provider fallback.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Authorization.ApplicationRoleValidator
member.summary: Prevents ASP.NET Identity from creating roles outside the application role allowlist.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Authorization.AuthorizationServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Registers LearningPortal's role-based authorization policies.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Authorization.AuthorizationServiceCollectionExtensions.AddApplicationAuthorization(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Adds the authenticated fallback policy and every named application policy.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.DependencyInjection
member.summary: Registers database, Identity, authentication, and infrastructure implementations.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.DependencyInjection.AddInfrastructure(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Adds infrastructure services using the supplied application configuration.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.ApplicationUser
member.summary: Represents an authenticated portal user persisted by ASP.NET Identity.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.ApplicationUser.DisplayName
member.summary: Gets or sets the user's display name.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.ApplicationUser.IsEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the user may authenticate.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.BootstrapAdministratorOptions
member.summary: Configures an optional idempotent bootstrap administrator account.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.BootstrapAdministratorOptions.SectionName
member.summary: Gets the configuration section name.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.BootstrapAdministratorOptions.Enabled
member.summary: Gets or sets whether bootstrap account creation is enabled.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.BootstrapAdministratorOptions.Email
member.summary: Gets or sets the bootstrap administrator email address.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.BootstrapAdministratorOptions.Password
member.summary: Gets or sets the bootstrap administrator password.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.BootstrapAdministratorOptions.DisplayName
member.summary: Gets or sets the bootstrap administrator display name.

member.summary: Resolves the current authenticated user's claims from the active HTTP context.

member.summary: Resolves the current authenticated user's claims from the active HTTP context.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.IAccessTokenGenerator
member.summary: Generates signed JWT access tokens for Identity users.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.IAccessTokenGenerator.GenerateAsync(LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.ApplicationUser,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Generates a signed access token for the specified user.

member.summary: Contains a generated JWT and its UTC expiration timestamp.

member.summary: Contains a generated JWT and its UTC expiration timestamp.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.GeneratedAccessToken.Token
member.summary: The serialized signed JWT.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.GeneratedAccessToken.ExpiresAtUtc
member.summary: The access token expiration timestamp.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.IdentityRoleSeeder
member.summary: Idempotently seeds the fixed LearningPortal role allowlist into ASP.NET Identity.
Idempotently seeds the fixed LearningPortal role allowlist into ASP.NET Identity.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.IdentityRoleSeedingExtensions
member.summary: Provides startup integration for idempotent ASP.NET Identity role seeding.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.IdentityRoleSeedingExtensions.SeedIdentityRolesAsync(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHost,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates missing application roles using a scoped role manager.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.IdentityService
member.summary: Authenticates Identity users and manages persisted refresh-token lifecycles.
Authenticates Identity users and manages persisted refresh-token lifecycles.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.IIdentityRoleSeeder
member.summary: Ensures that every supported application role exists in ASP.NET Identity.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.IIdentityRoleSeeder.SeedAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates missing application roles without modifying existing roles.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.IRefreshTokenProtector
member.summary: Generates cryptographically secure refresh tokens and one-way hashes them for persistence.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.IRefreshTokenProtector.Generate
member.summary: Generates new raw and hashed refresh-token material.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.IRefreshTokenProtector.Hash(System.String)
member.summary: Computes the stable one-way hash for a raw refresh token.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.IRefreshTokenProtector.Matches(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Compares a raw value with a stored hash using fixed-time comparison.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.GeneratedRefreshToken
member.summary: Contains short-lived refresh-token material used while issuing a response.
member.param: The opaque token returned to the caller.
The one-way hash stored in the database.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.GeneratedRefreshToken.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Contains short-lived refresh-token material used while issuing a response.
member.param: The opaque token returned to the caller.
The one-way hash stored in the database.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.GeneratedRefreshToken.RawToken
member.summary: The opaque token returned to the caller.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.GeneratedRefreshToken.TokenHash
member.summary: The one-way hash stored in the database.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.JwtAccessTokenGenerator
member.summary: Generates signed JWT access tokens with the portal's required identity claims.
Generates signed JWT access tokens with the portal's required identity claims.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.JwtOptions
member.summary: Contains settings used to validate and issue JWT access tokens.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.JwtOptions.SectionName
member.summary: The configuration section name.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.JwtOptions.Issuer
member.summary: Gets or sets the expected token issuer.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.JwtOptions.Audience
member.summary: Gets or sets the expected token audience.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.JwtOptions.SigningKey
member.summary: Gets or sets the symmetric signing key.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.JwtOptions.ExpirationMinutes
member.summary: Gets or sets the token lifetime in minutes.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.JwtOptions.RefreshTokenExpirationDays
member.summary: Gets or sets the refresh token lifetime in days.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.RefreshToken
member.summary: Represents a persisted, hashed refresh token and its rotation state.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.RefreshToken.Id
member.summary: Gets the persistence identifier.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.RefreshToken.UserId
member.summary: Gets the owning Identity user identifier.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.RefreshToken.TokenHash
member.summary: Gets the SHA-256 hash of the refresh token.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.RefreshToken.SecurityStampHash
member.summary: Gets the hash of the user's security stamp at issuance.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.RefreshToken.CreatedAtUtc
member.summary: Gets the token creation timestamp in UTC.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.RefreshToken.ExpiresAtUtc
member.summary: Gets the token expiration timestamp in UTC.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.RefreshToken.RevokedAtUtc
member.summary: Gets the token revocation timestamp in UTC.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.RefreshToken.ReplacedByTokenHash
member.summary: Gets the hash of the token that replaced this token during rotation.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.RefreshToken.CreatedByIp
member.summary: Gets the client IP address that created the token.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.RefreshToken.RevokedByIp
member.summary: Gets the client IP address that revoked or rotated the token.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.RefreshToken.RowVersion
member.summary: Gets the SQL Server rowversion used to prevent concurrent rotation.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.RefreshToken.Create(System.Guid,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.DateTimeOffset,System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Creates a persisted refresh-token record from a one-way token hash.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.RefreshToken.IsExpired(System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Determines whether the token has expired at the supplied UTC timestamp.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.RefreshToken.IsRevoked
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the token has been revoked.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.RefreshToken.IsActive(System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Determines whether the token can currently be used.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.RefreshToken.Revoke(System.DateTimeOffset,System.String)
member.summary: Revokes the token without assigning a replacement.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.RefreshToken.Rotate(System.String,System.DateTimeOffset,System.String)
member.summary: Revokes the token and records the hash of its rotation replacement.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Identity.RefreshTokenProtector
member.summary: Implements secure refresh-token generation and SHA-256 hashing.
